name: CoreLogic Property Data & Analytics API
what_it_does: CoreLogic REST API for property data, analytics, and mortgage intelligence platform. Enables AI agents to access property attributes and ownership records, retrieve automated valuation models (AVM) for property value estimates, handle mortgage and lien data, access flood, hazard, and climate risk data, retrieve comparable sales and market analytics, handle property tax and assessment data, access rental market and vacancy analytics, retrieve title and deed history, and integrate property intelligence with mortgage origination, real estate, and insurance platforms.
use_cases: Accessing property attributes and AVM valuations from mortgage automation agents
Retrieving flood and hazard risk data from property insurance underwriting agents
Accessing comparable sales and market analytics from real estate investment agents
Integrating property data with mortgage origination from lending automation agents
not_for: Consumer-facing property search without licensed data redistribution rights
Non-US markets without CoreLogic US property data coverage
Simple real estate without professional property data and analytics needs
best_when: A mortgage lender, real estate investor, property insurer, or appraisal company using CoreLogic wants AI agents to automate property valuation, risk assessment, market analytics, title research, and lending decision support.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK+PRIVACY: Property data includes sensitive ownership, mortgage, and financial information. AVM valuations are not certified appraisals — reliance for mortgage decisions requires licensed appraisal. Fair housing law (ECOA) prohibits discriminatory use of property data. Data redistribution requires licensed agreements.

auth.notes: CoreLogic uses OAuth 2.0 and API key for API access. Organization-level credentials with property, valuation, and risk scopes. Developer portal with API documentation. Data licensing agreements required for commercial use. Enterprise integration program.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — property data licensing required
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-query and data license enterprise pricing; annual contracts
pricing.notes: Irvine, California. Founded 2010 (spun from First American). Acquired by Stone Point Capital 2021 for $6B. Leading US property data and analytics company. 4.5B+ data records. 99% of US properties. Clients include top 10 mortgage lenders, major insurers, and real estate investors. Competes with Black Knight (now ICE) for mortgage data.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; enterprise SLA

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: AVM valuations are not certified appraisals — cannot replace licensed appraisal for mortgage decisions
ECOA/Fair Housing: Discriminatory use of property data in lending is illegal — agent automation must avoid proxy discrimination
No public MCP server — OAuth2 and API key REST API with enterprise developer portal
Data redistribution requires licensed agreements — cannot expose raw CoreLogic data to end users without license
FCRA compliance required if property data used in credit or employment decisions
No webhooks — polling required for property data and valuation updates
agent_readiness.security_notes: Property ownership and financial data. SOC2, FCRA, ECOA. OAuth2. US data residency. Fair housing and lending compliance.

security_score_components.security_notes: Property data. SOC2, FCRA, ECOA. OAuth2. US data residency. Fair housing compliance required.
